title: Global Markets Brief — 29 Jun 2026
intro: Risk-off sentiment dominates as European equities underperform and safe-haven flows support the dollar amid lingering growth concerns heading into mid-year.

sections.heading: 🌍 MACRO TONE
sections.content: Risk-off sentiment dominates as European equities underperform and safe-haven flows support the dollar amid lingering growth concerns heading into mid-year.

sections.heading: 📊 FX RANKING
sections.content:
NZD +0.21% — Outperforming on improved dairy auction results and positioning adjustment
GBP +0.10% — Sterling holds gains on resilient UK services data expectations
EUR +0.06% — Modest strength as euro zone inflation data awaited
USD +0.04% — Defensive bid emerging as equity weakness supports greenback
CHF -0.01% — Franc consolidating after recent safe-haven rally
CAD -0.02% — Loonie soft despite crude oil stabilization above $69
AUD -0.06% — Aussie weakens on China growth concerns and iron ore pressure

sections.heading: 💱 KEY PAIRS
sections.content:
EURUSD 1.1397 | Bias: NEUTRAL | Watch: 1.1350 support, 1.1450 resistance as rate divergence themes dominate
USDJPY 161.8020 | Bias: SHORT | Watch: 162.00 barrier holds intervention risk, BoJ speculation building
GBPUSD 1.3211 | Bias: LONG | Watch: 1.3200 support intact, targeting 1.3280 on services PMI strength

sections.heading: 📈 INDICES
sections.content:
S&P 500 5728.99 -0.72% — Tech sector profit-taking weighs after recent highs
Nasdaq 25298 -0.24% — AI momentum stocks consolidating gains
DAX 24671 -1.29% — German exporters pressured by euro strength and China demand fears
Nikkei 225 69053 -0.44% — Profit-taking after testing 70000 psychological level

sections.heading: 🛢️ COMMODITIES
sections.content:
Gold $4066.20 -0.73% — Pullback from record highs as dollar stabilizes but geopolitical premium remains elevated
WTI Crude $69.58 +0.51% — Climbing on inventory draw expectations and Middle East supply concerns
Silver $58.83 -1.41% — Sharp drop as industrial demand outlook weakens with risk-off tone

sections.heading: ₿ CRYPTO
sections.content:
Bitcoin $60010 +0.86% — Consolidating above $60k as institutional accumulation continues despite regulatory headwinds
Ethereum $1581.66 +0.76% — Holding support as network upgrade optimism offsets macro pressure

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: USDJPY 161.50 | Fade intervention fears, Fed-BoJ divergence supports upside to 163.50
LONG: WTI Crude 69.30 | OPEC+ discipline and summer demand support $72 target
SHORT: Gold 4070 | Overextended rally vulnerable to correction toward $3980 on profit-taking
SHORT: DAX 24700 | European weakness continues, target 24300 on export headwin
